<!-- Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial -->

:::: {.content-visible unless-format="revealjs"}
Configure the stages available to the records in your inventory. Record stages are manipulated via workflow transitions and are used to track the progress of records through your organization's record lifecycles.

- Default stages are provided for you as suggestions.
- You can add, edit, remove, and define your own custom stages.

::: {.callout}
`Archived` and `Deleted` are [Locked]{.bubble} stages,^[[Archive and delete records](/guide/inventory/archive-delete-records.qmd)] meaning they cannot be modified or removed.
:::

::::



:::: {.content-hidden unless-format="revealjs"}
Record stages are manipulated via workflow transitions and are used to track the progress of records through your organization's record lifecycles.

::::
